fields.title: Define backlog event-store contract
fields.description: Lock the canonical storage, replay, and conflict-resolution model for backlog so tau can support multiple collaborators in the same repository without a shared mutable issues.jsonl hotspot.
fields.design: Canonical tracked source of truth is immutable event files under .pi/backlog/events/**. Standardize the event envelope, replay order, import event shape, and field-level last-write-wins semantics for concurrent same-issue edits. The local materialized cache under .pi/backlog/cache/** is non-canonical and ignored by git.
fields.acceptance_criteria: Canonical tracked source of truth is .pi/backlog/events/**. Event envelope and replay ordering are specified and used consistently. Same-issue concurrent edits replay deterministically with field-level last-write-wins. Local materialized cache is explicitly non-canonical and git-ignored.
